_meta.keyKnowledge: We select and use a range of digital tools, including unfamiliar features, to create, find and communicate content.

_source.w: We select and use a range of digital tools, including unfamiliar features, to create, find and communicate content.
y: Being able to learn unfamiliar tools independently is one of the most important digital skills.
Selecting the right tool for each task maximises our productivity and the quality of our output.
Adaptability with technology prepares us for a world where tools constantly evolve.
eg: We explore unfamiliar features of digital tools by experimenting and consulting help resources.
We select the most appropriate tool for each task based on the outcome we need.
We use advanced features of word processors, spreadsheets and presentation tools.
We create content in multiple formats — text, image, video, interactive — using appropriate tools.
We evaluate new digital tools and decide whether they would improve our workflow.
We adapt quickly when required to use a tool we haven't used before.
